result.finding: Java 17 runtime with Spring Boot 3.3.2. The application runs on the JVM with embedded Apache Tomcat provided by spring-boot-starter-web. No Dockerfile base image to confirm container runtime variant.
evidence: Maven build file (pom.xml) confirms Java-based project
No Dockerfile to confirm container base image
values: Servlet container: Embedded Apache Tomcat (from spring-boot-starter-web)
Variant: standard JVM (no container base image)
